Summary: GET /products pagination returns same data for different pages
Steps to Reproduce: 1. Send GET request to /products?page=1&limit=5\n2. Send GET request to /products?page=2&limit=5\n3. Compare results
Actual Result: Page 2 returns same data as page 1\nNo proper pagination implemented
Expected Result: Page 2 returns different data\nProper pagination with metadata

Summary: GET /products category filter returns all products instead of filtered results
Steps to Reproduce: 1. Send GET request to /products?by_category=Tools\n2. Verify returned products
Actual Result: Returns all products regardless of category\nCategory filter not working
Expected Result: Returns only products with category 'Tools'\nProper category filtering

Summary: GET /products brand filter returns empty array for valid brand
Steps to Reproduce: 1. Send GET request to /products?by_brand=DeWalt\n2. Verify returned products
Actual Result: Returns empty array\nBrand filter not working
Expected Result: Returns products with brand 'DeWalt'\nProper brand filtering

Summary: GET /products search query returns no results for existing products
Steps to Reproduce: 1. Send GET request to /products?q=hammer\n2. Verify returned products
Actual Result: Returns empty array\nSearch functionality not working
Expected Result: Returns products containing 'hammer' in name or description\nProper search functionality

Summary: GET /products price range filter ignores max_price parameter
Steps to Reproduce: 1. Send GET request to /products?min_price=10&max_price=100\n2. Verify returned products
Actual Result: Returns products with price >= 10 only\nIgnores max_price parameter
Expected Result: Returns products with price between 10 and 100\nProper price range filtering

Summary: GET /products sorting by price returns unsorted results
Steps to Reproduce: 1. Send GET request to /products?sort=price&order=asc\n2. Verify product order
Actual Result: Returns products in random order\nSorting not working
Expected Result: Returns products sorted by price in ascending order\nProper sorting functionality

Summary: GET /products with invalid parameters returns 500 error instead of validation error
Steps to Reproduce: 1. Send GET request to /products?page=invalid\n2. Verify response
Expected Result: Status code: 422 or 400\nClear validation error message

Summary: GET /products with authentication token returns 401 error
Steps to Reproduce: 1. Send GET request to /products with Authorization header\n2. Verify response
Expected Result: Status code: 200\nPublic endpoint should work with or without authentication
